articles.description: El Salvador, the first country to make Bitcoin legal tender, is partnering with Argentina to create digital asset regulations. This move is part of El Salvador’s plan to collaborate with over 25 countries, sharing expertise to build effective crypto regulations in Latin America. articles.title: Avalanche raises $250 million to boost layer-1 upgrade
articles.description: Avalanche has raised $250 million from Galaxy Digital, Dragonfly and ParaFi Capital among other investors. The token sale comes as Avalanche nears the mainnet launch of its layer-1 blockchain upgrade. articles.title: Ethereum Overtakes Tron as the Leading Network for USDT Supply
articles.description: Ethereum’s DeFi ecosystem gets a liquidity boost as Tether mints $20 billion in USDT, showcasing the network's rising dominance over Tron.

articles.title: Solana outpaces Ethereum in attracting new crypto developers in 2024
articles.description: Solana became the leading blockchain for new crypto developers in 2024, with an 83% increase, surpassing Ethereum, according to Electric Capitals annual report.The report, reviewed by CoinDesk, revealed that Solana onboarded 7,625 new developers1,000 more than Ethereum during the same period.While Ethereum maintained its position as the largest developer network overall, its monthly active...

articles.title: Texas House proposes bill to establish Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
articles.description: The draft legislation suggested that Texas residents could fund the Bitcoin reserve through voluntary donations.

articles.title: Texas Legislator Introduces Bill to Establish Bitcoin Strategic Reserve
articles.description: The bill aims to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve in the state of Texas, mirroring efforts on the national level in the United States.

articles.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Acquires $12M in ETH, LINK, AAVE
articles.description: World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the decentralized finance initiative backed by President-elect Donald Trump, has acquired significant amounts of Ethereum (ETH), Chainlink (LINK), and Aave (AAVE) using USD Coin (USDC). Ethereum’s price surged 6.86% within 24 hours of the purchase. On December 12, WLFI processed $12 million in cryptocurrency transactions through its multi-signature wallet,...

articles.title: BlackRock's Bitcoin Spot ETF Overtakes Gold ETF in Size
